## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Tavrn and growthx.ai for content strategy and production.](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai offers an 8-week strategy sprint followed by ongoing execution, using AI-powered workflows to rapidly produce high-quality, customized content](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Tavrn and growthx.ai have similar approaches to decomposing complex processes into AI pipelines, albeit in different domains (legal documents vs. content marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Pedro is interested but wants to hire an in-house point person before fully engaging with growthx.ai's services](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in future collaboration, including potential API integration and co-marketing opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Content Production Process

  - [8-week strategy sprint to understand client's business, personas, and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Creation of custom AI pipelines and artifacts (e.g., style guides, templates) for efficient content production](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Use of internal platform with AI-powered workflows for research, writing, fact-checking, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Rapid content creation: e.g., 7 pieces published, 7 ready to go, 10 in production, 8 ready for approval within 5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Weekly meetings and updates with clients, including stats and Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Similarities Between Tavrn and growthx.ai Approaches

  - [Both companies decompose complex processes into AI pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Tavrn processes legal documents (e.g., 5,000-page data dumps) into structured demand letters](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [growthx.ai transforms content ideas into publishable articles through multiple steps](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Both involve creating ontologies, multiple pipelines, and running iterations to refine output](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### Potential Collaboration and Co-marketing

  - [Marcel suggested future API integration between Tavrn and growthx.ai workflows](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Possibility of public partnership and co-marketing opportunities (e.g., podcast appearances, media coverage)](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Marcel offered to help promote Tavrn regardless of formal collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Discussion of featuring Pedro on growthx.ai's podcast](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

### growthx.ai's Business Model and Growth

  - [Started in December of previous year, trending towards $15 million ARR](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Focus on high-value enterprise clients rather than individual signups](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Plans to gradually increase client access to their platform, from view-only to self-service workflow execution](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a lunch meeting to discuss further collaboration and content strategy for Tavrn](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Pedro to hire an in-house point person to manage potential engagement with growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Explore possibility of Pedro appearing on growthx.ai's podcast](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Consider starting the 8-week strategy sprint within the next month, pending Tavrn's readiness](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Marcel to remain flexible on scheduling if needed, while balancing team workload](https://fathom.video/share/BLtBXdkGTT_Madxojxu-5ExhZWGotTjX?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
